notes: Estimate is based on live same-project asking prices for Casa Green @ Bukit Jalil (mostly 1,003 sq ft units listed at RM440k-RM600k) and EdgeProp’s project transaction snapshot (sold price median RM499 psf; RM494-RM509 psf range over the last 48 months). I scaled the 1,003 sq ft comparables to the subject’s 1,130 sq ft size, which gives an implied range of roughly RM495k-RM643k from the sample asks and about RM558k-RM575k from the transaction psf band. I excluded rentals and room-only ads.
